Latest news from Carolyn

MP calls for wider Mounjaro access on NHS

January 7th 2026

On January 7th, I was on Good Morning Britain to speak about my experience with weight-loss medication and why access shouldn’t be based on BMI alone.

View more
View more

BBC Wales Interview on WRU

February 23rd 2026

Yesterday, I spoke to BBC Wales after clubs called an Extraordinary General Meeting of the WRU. I raised concerns about the lack of clarity around plans to reduce professional regions and called for greater transparency and proper engagement over the future of the Ospreys.

Everyone Deserves an Easter 2026

As part of Everyone Deserves an Easter, the team teamed up with Ospreys in the Community to provide the food for the Fit, Fed & Fun Camps across South Wales

April 17th 2026
